enter_instruction: Drag the magenta film onto the cyan
win_complete: The edition is complete — for now.
daily_signin_prompt: Sign in to join the leaderboard.
daily_leaderboard_empty: No one has solved it yet today.
rule_decalage_aligned: ⇄ World (or Shift+arrow) slides the magenta film. The registration marks must line up at the end.
rule_decalage_off: Registration off by [{x}, {y}] — watch the marks. Realign before the end.
rule_glace: Ice: everything slides until it hits something. White squares stop only the light.
rule_lightwalls: White squares block the merged piece — the inks pass through them. And vice versa.
rule_fusion_merged: Merged: the light passes through the inks. To split: ✕ then a direction.
rule_fusion_split: Bring them onto the same cell to merge. Each must end on its own circle.
rule_base: One gesture moves both points. Blocked by a wall or an edge, a point stays put.
hint_retenue: What blocks one frees the other.
hint_ecart: Lose your way to find it.
hint_diffraction: Split them at the right moment, the right way.
hint_trouvaille: Found by the machine. 21 moves at best.
hint_abysse: The deepest known. 22 moves at best.
hint_eclipse: White through ink. Ink through white.
hint_echange: Each must end where the other began.
hint_derive: Slide the world under the pieces. 22 moves at best.
hint_tectonique: Two splits, worlds in motion. 23 moves.
